title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
